# linear_release_pipeline (Resource)

Linear release pipeline.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "linear_release_pipeline" "production" {
  name          = "Production"
  type          = "continuous"
  is_production = true
  teams         = [linear_team.engineering.id]

  default_stage = {
    name  = "Started"
    color = "#f59e0b"
  }
}

resource "linear_release_pipeline" "staging" {
  name = "Staging"
  type = "scheduled"

  include_path_patterns = ["src/**", "lib/**"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the release pipeline.

### Optional

- `default_stage` (Attributes) Settings for the default `started` stage created with the pipeline. *This can not be deleted.* (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--default_stage))
- `include_path_patterns` (List of String) Glob patterns to filter commits by file path.
- `is_production` (Boolean) Whether this pipeline targets a production environment.
- `teams` (Set of String) Identifiers of the teams associated with this pipeline.
- `type` (String) Type of the pipeline: `continuous` or `scheduled`. **Default** `continuous`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier of the release pipeline.

<a id="nestedatt--default_stage"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_stage`

Optional:

- `color` (String) Color of the stage. **Default** `#f59e0b`.
- `name` (String) Name of the stage. **Default** `Started`.

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Identifier of the release stage.
- `position` (Number) Position of the stage.
